adapters.name: research-project
adapters.status: intended; not yet implemented in Make_Skills
adapters.purpose: Customizes the core Agency-to-Structure Engine for research-heavy projects: defines what to watch (lit review patterns, recurring research questions, synthesis cycles, decision points), how to surface findings, and what kinds of skill candidates emerge in research work.

adapters.name: development
adapters.status: intended; not yet implemented in Make_Skills
adapters.purpose: Active when work moves into the apps/ + services/ directories. Watches dev tasks, architecture corrections, naming patterns, etc. (Same adapter the Hub uses for its dev instance.)

active_adapter_today: research-project (primary). The development adapter activates when apps/ or services/ get populated.
